violations.description: Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop sitting in dirty water in bucket in back room.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Food contact surface of utensil/equipment was not properly cleaned and sanitized. -Employee stated tongs for roller grill are cleaned nightly. They need to be cleaned after every 4 hrs. of use.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Nacho cheese and chili dispensers are clogged and not emitting product.
